summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Soul Food e-commerce platform critical features. All 6 critical features verified working: Free downloads (In His Image Adult/Youth PDFs > 1MB), TESTII coupon disabled, DOLLARTEST coupon with $1 override working, checkout flow with coupon application, My Library page structure correct.

issues: DOLLARTEST coupon shows '(0% off)' which may confuse users since it uses override_total instead of percentage discount. Consider showing 'Cart set to $1.00' instead

critical_code_review_comments: Free download endpoint (/api/interactive-lessons/download/in-his-image/{edition}) correctly checks multiple paths for PDF files
Coupon validation correctly handles override_total for DOLLARTEST coupon
CheckoutPage.js correctly calculates discount using override_total (lines 705-714)
MyLibrary.js has correct structure for displaying purchases with thumbnails (lines 330-400)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical features verified working: 1) Free In His Image downloads (Adult: 4.36MB, Youth: 3.46MB), 2) TESTII coupon returns valid=false, 3) DOLLARTEST coupon returns valid=true with override_total=1.0, 4) Checkout page correctly applies coupon and shows $1.00 total, 5) My Library page shows correct structure with My Content section, Quick Access, and Rewards. Beta login works with instructor/test123.

free_download_adult.details: Returns HTTP 200, valid PDF, size 4.36MB (> 1MB requirement)

free_download_youth.details: Returns HTTP 200, valid PDF, size 3.46MB (> 1MB requirement)

testii_coupon_disabled.details: TESTII returns valid=false with 'Invalid coupon code' message

checkout_with_coupon.details: Cart total correctly shows $1.00 when DOLLARTEST applied (tested with $22.97 cart)

my_library_page.details: Page shows correct structure: My Content section (with thumbnails/download buttons when purchases exist), Quick Access links, Soul Food Rewards, Gift Certificates

frontend_ui_tests: My Library redirects to auth when not logged in
My Library shows correct structure for logged-in user
